untranslatable_reason: Signal requires market regime classification (Bull vs Bear market context) and dynamic price targets computed via 'measure rule' which are not expressible with allowed indicators. Candlestick pattern recognition (Doji/Gravestone precise morphology) and conditional performance thresholds based on market regime are not directly available. Breakout direction detection and context-dependent entry logic cannot be fully parameterized.
translation_notes: Approximated Doji/Gravestone pattern using body_pct < 3% (small body). Gravestone variant indicated by upper_wick dominance (entry_long) vs lower_wick dominance (entry_short). Used pivot as proxy for measure rule price target. Performance percentages from source data (5.27%-10.51%) noted but cannot be applied without regime classification. Stop loss set at midpoint of observed ranges. Hold period estimated conservatively.
